texto: I don't do very well with extremes of any kind - extreme diets, extreme fitness - so moderation makes a lot of sense, and Hershey's has really great portion-friendly desserts to help people incorporate treats into their lifestyles so they don't feel like they're depriving themselves and are still living a balanced life.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kimberly Williams-Paisley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't do very well with extremes of any kind - extreme diets, extreme fitness - so moderation m…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, great, help pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de academia e termino.

frase_original: I don't do very well with extremes of any kind - extreme diets, extreme fitness - so moderation makes a lot of sense, and Hershey's has really great portion-friendly desserts to help people incorporate treats into their lifestyles so they don't feel like they're depriving themselves and are still living a balanced life.
